SELECT [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[Name], [p0].[ImagePath], [p0].[Description], [c].[CategoryName], [p0].[Price], [s].[StockId], [s].[Quantity], [c].[CategoryId], [r].[ReviewId], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ProductId], [r].[ReviewPoints], [r].[Summary], [r].[UserId], [r0].[Summary], [r0].[ReviewPoints], [r0].[ReviewId]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[ActiveStatus] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price]

SELECT [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[Status], [o0].[TotalProductsCount], [o0].[OrderTotalAmount], [o0].[DeliveryDate], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Refunds] AS [r]
        WHERE [r].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [a].[AddressId], [a].[AddressLine1], [a].[AddressLine2], [a].[State], [a].[City], [a].[Pincode], [p].[PaymentId], [p].[PaymentType], [s].[OrderDetailsId], [s].[ProductId], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[ProductPrice], [s].[ImagePath], [s].[ProductId0]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[AddressId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[DeliveryDate], [o].[OrderTotalAmount], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalProductsCount]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[UserId] = @userId
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o0]
INNER JOIN [Addresses] AS [a] ON [o0].[AddressId] = [a].[AddressId]
LEFT JOIN [Payments] AS [p] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [p].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o1].[OrderDetailsId], [o1].[ProductId], [o1].[ProductName], [o1].[Quantity], [o1].[ProductPrice], [p0].[ImagePath], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0], [o1].[OrderId]
    FROM [OrderDetails] AS [o1]

SELECT [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[Status], [o0].[TotalProductsCount], [o0].[OrderTotalAmount], [o0].[DeliveryDate], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Refunds] AS [r]
        WHERE [r].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [a].[AddressId], [a].[AddressLine1], [a].[AddressLine2], [a].[State], [a].[City], [a].[Pincode], [p].[PaymentId], [p].[PaymentType], [s].[OrderDetailsId], [s].[ProductId], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[ProductPrice], [s].[ImagePath], [s].[ProductId0]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[AddressId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[DeliveryDate], [o].[OrderTotalAmount], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalProductsCount]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[UserId] = @userId
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o0]
INNER JOIN [Addresses] AS [a] ON [o0].[AddressId] = [a].[AddressId]
LEFT JOIN [Payments] AS [p] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [p].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o1].[OrderDetailsId], [o1].[ProductId], [o1].[ProductName], [o1].[Quantity], [o1].[ProductPrice], [p0].[ImagePath], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0], [o1].[OrderId]
    FROM [OrderDetails] AS [o1]

    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[ActiveStatus] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]

) AS [p0]

LEFT JOIN [Stock] AS [s] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [s].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [r].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r0] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [r0].[ProductId]

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[ActiveStatus] = CAST(1 AS bit)

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[ActiveStatus] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]

) AS [p0]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
LEFT JOIN [Stock] AS [s] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [s].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [r].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r0] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [r0].[ProductId]

SELECT [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[Status], [o0].[TotalProductsCount], [o0].[OrderTotalAmount], [o0].[DeliveryDate], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Refunds] AS [r]
        WHERE [r].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [a].[AddressId], [a].[AddressLine1], [a].[AddressLine2], [a].[State], [a].[City], [a].[Pincode], [p].[PaymentId], [p].[PaymentType], [s].[OrderDetailsId], [s].[ProductId], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[ProductPrice], [s].[ImagePath], [s].[ProductId0]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[AddressId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[DeliveryDate], [o].[OrderTotalAmount], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalProductsCount]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[UserId] = @userId
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o0]
INNER JOIN [Addresses] AS [a] ON [o0].[AddressId] = [a].[AddressId]
LEFT JOIN [Payments] AS [p] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [p].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o1].[OrderDetailsId], [o1].[ProductId], [o1].[ProductName], [o1].[Quantity], [o1].[ProductPrice], [p0].[ImagePath], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0], [o1].[OrderId]
    FROM [OrderDetails] AS [o1]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p0] ON [o1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
) AS [s] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [s].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [o0].[CreatedAt] DESC, [o0].[OrderId], [a].[AddressId], [p].[PaymentId], [s].[ProductName], [s].[OrderDetailsId]

        SELECT 1
        FROM [Refunds] AS [r]
        WHERE [r].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [a].[AddressId], [a].[AddressLine1], [a].[AddressLine2], [a].[State], [a].[City], [a].[Pincode], [p].[PaymentId], [p].[PaymentType], [s].[OrderDetailsId], [s].[ProductId], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[ProductPrice], [s].[ImagePath], [s].[ProductId0]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[AddressId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[DeliveryDate], [o].[OrderTotalAmount], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalProductsCount]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[UserId] = @userId
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o0]
INNER JOIN [Addresses] AS [a] ON [o0].[AddressId] = [a].[AddressId]
LEFT JOIN [Payments] AS [p] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [p].[OrderId]

) AS [s] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [s].[OrderId]

    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Refunds] AS [r]
        WHERE [r].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [a].[AddressId], [a].[AddressLine1], [a].[AddressLine2], [a].[State], [a].[City], [a].[Pincode], [p].[PaymentId], [p].[PaymentType], [s].[OrderDetailsId], [s].[ProductId], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[ProductPrice], [s].[ImagePath], [s].[ProductId0]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[AddressId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[DeliveryDate], [o].[OrderTotalAmount], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalProductsCount]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[UserId] = @userId
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o0]
INNER JOIN [Addresses] AS [a] ON [o0].[AddressId] = [a].[AddressId]
LEFT JOIN [Payments] AS [p] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [p].[OrderId]

) AS [s] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [s].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [o0].[CreatedAt] DESC, [o0].[OrderId], [a].[AddressId], [p].[PaymentId], [s].[ProductName], [s].[OrderDetailsId]
